pi_items.source: Task description line 3: 'Create a new Unit Process in OpenLCA named "Bio-based Polyol Production"'
Task description line 4: 'Create a new Actor named "EcoTech Consulting"'
Task description line 5: 'Create a new Source named "Q4 2024 Production Report"'

Task description line 7: 'In the Technology Description field, enter exactly: "Enzymatic hydrolysis of agricultural residues."' - Note: the period is inside the quotation marks in the instruction, indicating it is part of the exact text to enter
Task description line 8: 'Set the Validity period to start from 2024-01-01' - the year component is 2024

privileged_info_summary: This task is a synthetic OpenLCA metadata creation exercise with no external datasets. Agents are asked to create specific entities: a Process named 'Bio-based Polyol Production', an Actor named 'EcoTech Consulting', and a Source named 'Q4 2024 Production Report'. The technology description should be set to 'Enzymatic hydrolysis of agricultural residues.' (with a period), and validity should start from 2024-01-01. One metadata claim contains an error: expected_tech_desc omits the trailing period that is explicitly required in the task instructions.
